final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for the Changan Origin Q06 vehicle launch announcement.

Style/medium: needs a premium automotive launch aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include primary headline centered, secondary subtitle below, with a spacious breathable layout
Subject: must include the Changan Origin Q06 as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a transparent and impactful background — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs an awe-inspiring atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a brand-aligned direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06将于9月上市" (headline), with secondary subtitle text as appropriate
Constraints: must preserve the brand tone consistency, breathable layout with clear hierarchy
Avoid:
